texto: Nothing you love is left behind. You come back to it once you understand it, once you see its essence as it is: pure and flawless - once you refuse to define your life without it. Look into yourself. The only thing you regret in the end is falling for someone's definition of love instead of exploring its infinite potential. It is not saying "I love you" to people who should have heard it from you. There is no flaw in love.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Vladimira Chalyova sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “Nothing you love is left behind. You come back to it once you understand it, once you see its ess…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, camino, camino-de-santiago, útil em momentos de inspiracao e termino.
